name: ultimate-tokens
description: Consume an exported Ultimate Tokens design-token kit correctly in any project. Three skills teach a coding agent to pick the right semantic role for every UI surface instead of guessing values: color-tokens (the 53-role colour layer — buttons, text, containers, feedback, navigation), typography-tokens (the eleven-voice type scale), and geometry-tokens (the two-tier dimensional system — controls, containers, the Material-3-aligned radius scale). Each binds to the project's real exported variable names (including Material --md-sys-* naming) and carries a maintainer parity gate against the engine.
